2026-04-26.title: Reflect on God's faithfulness in your past week.
2026-04-26.question: Where have you seen God's mercy and renewal recently?

2026-04-27.title: Spend time in prayer focusing on trust.
2026-04-27.question: What areas of your life do you need to fully surrender to God?

2026-04-28.title: Read a Psalm aloud and meditate on it.
2026-04-28.question: How does God being your shepherd bring you peace?

2026-04-29.title: Encourage someone with a Scripture.
2026-04-29.question: How can you remind someone they are not alone?

2026-04-30.title: Practice gratitude through prayer.
2026-04-30.question: What are three things you can thank God for today?

2026-05-01.title: Study a teaching of Jesus.
2026-05-01.question: How can you show Christ-like love in a practical way today?

2026-05-02.title: Prepare your heart for a new week with reflection.
2026-05-02.question: What does it mean for you to have a clean heart and renewed spirit?

2026-05-03.title: Share a Bible verse on social media and discuss its relevance.
2026-05-03.question: How did the verse resonate with your online community?

2026-05-04.title: Read a Psalm and use it as a basis for your prayer time.
2026-05-04.question: What aspects of God's character are highlighted in the Psalm, and how can you apply them in your prayers?

2026-05-05.title: Create a gratitude list inspired by Scripture.
2026-05-05.question: What specific blessings can you thank God for today?

2026-05-06.title: Seek God's kingdom first in your priorities.
2026-05-06.question: What distractions might be pulling you away from God?

2026-05-07.title: Study a parable and reflect deeply.
2026-05-07.question: What does this teach you about the value of God's kingdom?

2026-05-08.title: Renew your mind through Scripture memorization.
2026-05-08.question: What thought patterns need to be transformed?

2026-05-09.title: Stay encouraged in doing good.
2026-05-09.question: Where do you need perseverance right now?

2026-05-10.title: Reflect on the importance of relationships.
2026-05-10.question: Who can you support or lean on today?

2026-05-11.title: Rest in God's plans for your future.
2026-05-11.question: How does trusting God's plan change your outlook?

2026-05-12.title: Fix your focus on Jesus.
2026-05-12.question: What distractions can you lay aside today?

2026-05-13.title: Encourage someone intentionally.
2026-05-13.question: Who can you uplift with your words today?

2026-05-14.title: Reflect on God's creation during a quiet moment.
2026-05-14.question: What reminds you of God's presence in creation?

2026-05-15.title: Be a doer of the Word.
2026-05-15.question: What action step can you take from what you've learned?

2026-05-16.title: Practice humility and service.
2026-05-16.question: How can you put others before yourself today?

2026-05-17.title: Spend time in worship and gratitude.
2026-05-17.question: How can you express joy and thankfulness to God today?

2026-05-18.title: Focus on God's peace.
2026-05-18.question: What worries can you release to receive His peace?

2026-05-19.title: Trust God in uncertainty.
2026-05-19.question: How can you keep your mind stayed on Him?

2026-05-20.title: Walk by faith, not by sight.
2026-05-20.question: Where is God calling you to trust Him more?

2026-05-21.title: Practice forgiveness.
2026-05-21.question: Is there someone you need to forgive today?

2026-05-22.title: Strengthen your faith through the Word.
2026-05-22.question: How can you consistently grow your faith?

2026-05-23.title: Seek wisdom from God.
2026-05-23.question: What decision do you need God's wisdom for?

2026-05-24.title: Abide in God's love.
2026-05-24.question: What does it look like for you to remain in Him daily?

2026-05-25.title: Celebrate God's goodness.
2026-05-25.question: Where have you experienced God's goodness recently?
